name: India
intro: India produces more new PMP and CSM holders every year than any other country, and the reason is practical: employers here treat certification as the fastest signal that a candidate can run delivery without hand-holding. IT services firms, global capability centres, banks and manufacturers all map their internal job ladders to credentials, and appraisal cycles reward them directly. Our batches run live online on Indian Standard Time, taught over a single weekend so working professionals do not need leave approvals. The fee is billed in rupees with GST invoices that most Indian employers reimburse under learning budgets. Trainers work through Indian case studies — vendor-driven programmes, distributed teams, tight client SLAs — rather than generic Western examples. After class you get exam application support, which matters in India where audit rates on applications are high, plus mock tests and doubt-clearing sessions until you clear the exam.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in India?
faq.a: The course fee is ₹24,999 (PMP or CSM), covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in India?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across India.
